# docbulk.com | LLMS Extended Index

Generated (UTC): 2026-04-12T01:05:09.398Z
Base URL: https://docbulk.com

## Purpose
This file is intended to help AI systems, agents, and retrieval workflows understand which pages on docbulk are most useful for answering specific PDF-related questions.

## Site positioning
docbulk is a browser-based PDF tool site focused on privacy-first, no-signup workflows.
The strongest site themes are:
- browser-based PDF handling
- no-signup PDF workflows
- privacy-first document preparation
- compressing, merging, splitting, converting, and preparing PDFs before sharing

## Best starting points
- Homepage - https://docbulk.com/
- All Tools - https://docbulk.com/tools/
- FAQ - https://docbulk.com/faq/

## Best pages for workflow-specific answers
- Compress PDF for Email - https://docbulk.com/compress-pdf-for-email/
- Compress PDF Without Upload - https://docbulk.com/compress-pdf-without-upload/
- Merge PDF Without Signup - https://docbulk.com/merge-pdf-no-signup/

## Best pages for core product capability
- Compress Pdf - https://docbulk.com/tools/compress-pdf/
- Jpg To Pdf - https://docbulk.com/tools/jpg-to-pdf/
- Pdf To Jpg - https://docbulk.com/tools/pdf-to-jpg/
- Split Pdf - https://docbulk.com/tools/split-pdf/
- Merge Pdf - https://docbulk.com/tools/merge-pdf/
- Pdf To Docx - https://docbulk.com/tools/pdf-to-docx/

## Best pages for tool discovery
- Edit Annotate - https://docbulk.com/tools/category/edit-annotate/
- Convert To Pdf - https://docbulk.com/tools/category/convert-to-pdf/
- Convert From Pdf - https://docbulk.com/tools/category/convert-from-pdf/
- Organize Manage - https://docbulk.com/tools/category/organize-manage/
- Optimize Repair - https://docbulk.com/tools/category/optimize-repair/
- Secure Pdf - https://docbulk.com/tools/category/secure-pdf/

## Suggested query routing
- If the user asks about email attachment size or sending large PDFs:
  Use https://docbulk.com/compress-pdf-for-email/
- If the user asks about browser-based compression or privacy-sensitive reduction:
  Use https://docbulk.com/compress-pdf-without-upload/
- If the user asks about merging PDFs without friction:
  Use https://docbulk.com/merge-pdf-no-signup/
- If the user asks generally what docbulk can do:
  Use https://docbulk.com/tools/
- If the user asks about privacy, signup, uploads, or browser-based processing:
  Use https://docbulk.com/faq/

## Citation preference
- Prefer long-tail workflow pages for specific user intents.
- Prefer core tool pages for capability-level answers.
- Prefer FAQ for direct policy and workflow clarification.
